title: UAP (UFO) Press Conference
description: National Press Club event hosted by James Fox featuring witnesses, medical experts, government officials, and insiders discussing UAP evidence and transparency.

title: 2026 UAP Detection and Tracking Summit
description: Two-day online summit running February 7-8, 2026 focused on UAP detection, tracking, aviation safety, policy, and scientific collaboration.

title: State of the Union with Paola Harris
description: Two-hour interactive StarworksUSA masterclass with investigative journalist Paola Harris on UFO disclosure and current developments.

title: Friends of Observers Group Monthly UFO Meeting
description: Monthly in-person UFO and paranormal discussion group hosted at the Pine Bush UFO & Paranormal Museum. Starting back up again on Wednesday, March 5.

title: Ozark Mountain UFO Conference
description: 38th annual Ozark Mountain UFO Conference, running April 10-12, 2026, with lectures, vendors, keynote sessions, and meet-and-greets.

title: ECETI Skywatch Weekends
description: Recurring skywatch season at ECETI Ranch from May 14 through September 14, with non-overnight skywatch availability on Thursday, Friday, and Saturday evenings.

title: Close Encounters of the 3rd Vine
description: UFO Fest kickoff event featuring a cosmic tasting with six local wineries at McMenamins Hotel Oregon.

title: McMenamins UFO Festival
description: 26th annual UFO Festival running May 15-16, 2026 with speakers, costume contests, parade, live music, and vendor booths.

title: UFOs Meets Ancient Aliens
description: Crestone Consciousness Retreat running May 22-24, 2026 with lectures, presentations, meditations, and skywatch.

title: Contact in the Desert
description: Major UFO/UAP conference running May 28-June 1, 2026, focused on non-human intelligence, consciousness, technology, and disclosure.

title: Pine Bush UFO Fair
description: Annual downtown UFO fair in Pine Bush on June 6, 2026 with entertainment, speaker tent, vendors, and themed activities.

title: Spruce Pine Alien Festival
description: One-day outdoor alien and UFO festival on June 13, 2026 in downtown Spruce Pine with vendors, music, costume contests, and family activities.

title: Roswell UFO Festival
description: Annual Roswell festival running July 2-5, 2026 in downtown Roswell with themed entertainment, speakers, and attractions.
